summary: Completed testing of payment and email confirmation features. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI features working correctly. Payment filter, payment dropdown, and email toggle all functional.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor rendering issue on initial load

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 72 candidaturas from Excel import
context_for_next_testing_agent: All payment and email features tested and working. 72 candidaturas in DB. 36 have email_confirmado=true. 61 have pagamento='Por Pagar', 11 have 'Recusado p/Mc'. 5 price options in tabela_precos with correct values (467.40€, 467.40€, 430.50€, 888.06€, 853.01€).

backend_apis: GET /api/precos - Returns 5 prices with correct values
frontend_ui: Payment filter dropdown filters candidaturas correctly (61 with 'Por Pagar')
Payment dropdown in table updates state and shows toast notification
Email toggle button toggles email_confirmado and shows toast notification
Stats update in real-time after changes
